zh.lifeSummary: 當Hamelin Matham於1340年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞莫萊時，他的父親Samson de Matham36歲，母親Margaret de Surrey31歲。他和Ceciley de Lyons至少有2個女兒。他去世於大約1382年在英國英格蘭賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: Matham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Mattins Farm in Radwinter or Martinfield Green in Saffron Walden (both Essex).
3 English: nickname possibly from Middle English mathme, mathom ‘treasure, precious gift’ (Old English māðm, maððum), though the early bearers cited here may rather belong to (1) or (2).

variants.name: Mattam
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Matham  .

variants.name: Matthams
meanings: English: variant of Matham with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Hamelin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Dominique, Etienne, Jacques, Jean-Paul, Lucien, Monique, Normand, Renald.

variants.name: Hamel
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the tree (Old English hæsel), or its light reddish-brown nuts. This is one of the most successful of the names coined in the 19th century from words denoting plants.

en.lifeSummary: When Hamelin Matham was born in 1340, in Molesey, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, his father, Samson de Matham, was 36 and his mother, Margaret de Surrey, was 31. He had at least 2 daughters with Ceciley de Lyons. He died about 1382, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hamelin Matham est né en 1340, à Molesey, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Samson de Matham, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Surrey, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Ceciley de Lyons. Il est décédé environ 1382, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hamelin Matham 1340 in Molesey, Surrey, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Samson de Matham 36 und seine Mutter Margaret de Surrey 31. Er hatte mit Ceciley de Lyons mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1382 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hamelin Matham è nato il nel 1340 nel Molesey, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Samson de Matham, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Surrey, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Ceciley de Lyons. Morì circa 1382, nel Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hamelin Mathamが1340年にイギリスイギリススリーモレセイで生まれた時，父Samson de Mathamは36歳，母Margaret de Surreyは31歳であった。彼はCeciley de Lyonsとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1382年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hamelin Matham(이)가 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 모레시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Samson de Matham(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Surrey(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Ceciley de Lyons(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1382년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hamelin Matham nasceu em 1340, em Molesey, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Samson de Matham, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Surrey, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Ceciley de Lyons. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1382, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hamelin Matham родился в 1340 г. в местности молеси, сурри, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Samson de Matham было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Surrey, 31. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Ceciley de Lyons. Он умер около 1382 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hamelin Matham nació en 1340, en Molesey, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Samson de Matham, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret de Surrey, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Ceciley de Lyons. Murió aproximadamente 1382, en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años.
